name: CMS Screening Officer
description: Screens complaints and routes them to the correct department

name: Config Admin
description: One who can access configs

name: Report Viewer
description: One who will view the reports of tickets

name: Complaint Resolver
description: One who will resolve complaints

name: Complaint Assessor
description: One who will assess & assign complaints

name: Complainant
description: One who will create complaints

name: Localisation admin
description: LOC_ADMIN

name: MDMS ADMIN
description: MDMS User that can create and search schema

name: Reindexing Role
description: Role for reindexing for encrypted data access

name: Internal Microservice Role
description: Internal role for plain access

name: Basic employee roles
description: Basic employee roles

name: System user
description: System user role

name: Auto Escalation Supervisor
description: Escalation to particular role

name: Auto Escalation Employee
description: Auto Escalation Employee

name: QA Automation
description: QA Automation

name: HRMS Admin
description: HRMS Admin

name: Super User
description: System Administrator. Can change all master data and has access to all the system screens.

name: Employee
description: Default role for all employees

name: Citizen
description: Citizen who can raise complaint

name: Anonymous User
description: Anonymous User to be used in case of no auth

name: WORKFLOW ADMIN
description: WORKFLOW User that can create and search Workflow

name: Department GRO
description: Department-level Grievance Routing Officer; routes and manages complaints within a specific department

name: CMS Reception Officer
description: Intake officer who registers complaints on behalf of citizens via counter, green line, or letters

name: CMS Case Manager
description: Manages complaint investigation and coordinates resolution with relevant departments

name: CMS Supervisor
description: Supervises complaint handling; can assign, escalate, reject, and override decisions

name: CMS Dashboard Viewer
description: Read-only access to complaint search, count, and status reports

name: CMS Admin
description: System administrator; manages master data, categories, and system configuration

name: CMS Viewer
description: Oversight role for the CMS complaint workflow; can view and act on complaints per the workflow definition

name: Central User
description: Scope role: user belongs to the central IGE/IGSAE unit and can see complaints across all tenants

name: Department User
description: Scope role: user belongs to a specific department and sees only that department's complaints

name: Complaints Viewer
description: Permission role: grants read-only access to complaint search, count, and status

name: Complaints Editor
description: Permission role: grants access to update complaints and perform workflow transitions

name: Complaints Creator
description: Permission role: grants access to register new complaints

name: Confidential Complaint Viewer
description: Permission role: grants access to view unmasked confidential complaint data and extended attributes
